name: Digital Turbine
description: Digital Turbine — Mobile app distribution and ad monetization platform with carrier-integrated app delivery and programmatic advertising.

seo.title: Digital Turbine — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Digital Turbine: Digital Turbine — Mobile app distribution and ad monetization platform with carrier-integrated app delivery and programmatic advertising.

when_to_use: Carrier-integrated app pre-install distribution for OEM device activation
Programmatic mobile UA via SingleTap carrier-level installs
App monetization through carrier-distributed advertising inventory
Device manufacturer partnership for pre-loaded app distribution at scale

pros: Works for large publishers and OEM deals
cons: Not an ASO tool in the traditional sense
Carrier deals only make sense for big apps
Little value for organic keyword growth
review.verdict: Distribution and monetization giant, not an ASO platform, useful only at serious scale.
review.best_for: Large publishers chasing pre-loads and programmatic monetization
review.not_for: Indie developers focused on organic store growth

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
